article_title: B.C. Reg. 240/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: Electrical power corporation transmission and distribution line valuation rates updated for 2026
briefs.summary: BC Assessment has amended the Electrical Power Corporations Valuation Regulation, updating per-circuit-kilometre valuation rates for distribution and transmission line classes effective 2026.
briefs.action_required: Review updated valuation rates to assess potential impact on your 2026 property tax assessment.

key_dates.label: BC Electrical Power Corporations Valuation Regulation 2026 rates take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 240/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
